metadata.title: Engineering Risk, Uncertainty, and Resilience Lab
metadata.description: Engineering Risk, Uncertainty, and Resilience Lab at Rice University.

brand.name: Engineering Risk, Uncertainty, and Resilience Lab
brand.subtitle: Rice Civil & Environmental Engineering

hero.title: Engineering Risk, Uncertainty, and Resilience Lab
hero.text: Led by Dr. Sang-ri Yi at Rice University, the lab develops scalable uncertainty quantification methods for complex, large-scale, multi-hazard simulation models.

footer.name: Engineering Risk, Uncertainty, and Resilience Lab

researchIntro.title: Research
body: We develop computational **Uncertainty Quantification (UQ)** methods, essential in optimal, uncertainty-aware decisions for **resilient urban community.**
